title: tephroseris integrifolia subsp. capitata
intro: Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. capitata, also known as the Alpine Hawk's Beard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. capitata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
